naturalMeaning: 模型在胡说八道/编造信息（AI模型生成了不正确或不存在的内容）
example: I asked it when the event was and it totally made up a date — the model is hallucinating again.
exampleTranslation: 我问它活动时间，结果它瞎编了一个日期——模型又开始胡说八道了。

naturalMeaning: 输入数据质量差，输出结果也一定差（强调数据质量的重要性）
example: You can't expect good results if your training data is full of typos — garbage in, garbage out.
exampleTranslation: 如果你的训练数据全是拼写错误，就别指望好结果——垃圾进垃圾出。

naturalMeaning: 在预训练模型的基础上用你自己的数据集进一步训练来适配特定任务
example: We should fine-tune on our own data to make the model sound more like our brand voice.
exampleTranslation: 我们应该用自己的数据做微调，让模型的语气更像我们的品牌调性。

naturalMeaning: 模型输出的质量或行为随时间推移逐渐变差（通常因为数据分布或使用模式变化）
example: We've noticed the model is drifting — the responses used to be a lot more accurate a month ago.
exampleTranslation: 我们注意到模型在漂移——一个月前的回复准确多了。

expression: the model is reasoning through it
literalTranslation: 模型在推理/一步步思考
naturalMeaning: 模型不是直接给答案，而是逐步分析推理得出结果（类似chain-of-thought）
example: You can actually see the model is reasoning through it step by step before giving the final answer.
exampleTranslation: 你能看到模型在一步步推理，然后才给出最终答案。

naturalMeaning: 这个模型参数量很大、运行成本高或推理速度慢（非正式说法）
example: I wouldn't run that on your laptop — that's a heavy model, it needs a GPU cluster.
exampleTranslation: 别在你笔记本上跑那个——那是个大模型，得用GPU集群。

expression: the model went off the rails
naturalMeaning: 模型输出完全偏离主题或变得不可控，开始胡言乱语
example: Everything was fine until it started talking about conspiracy theories — the model went off the rails.
exampleTranslation: 本来都好好的，突然开始讲阴谋论——模型完全跑偏了。

naturalMeaning: 先推出产品发布上线，再根据反馈不断改进（硅谷常见的敏捷开发理念）
example: We've been tweaking this model forever — let's just ship it and iterate.
exampleTranslation: 这个模型我们调了很久了——先上线再迭代吧。

naturalMeaning: 修改对AI的输入指令来改善输出质量
example: It keeps giving us short answers — try tweaking the prompt to ask for more detail.
exampleTranslation: 它老是给很短的回答——试着调整一下提示词，让它写详细点。

expression: prompt engineering is half the battle
literalTranslation: 提示词工程就打赢了一半
naturalMeaning: 写好提示词对最终效果的影响非常大，是工作中最关键的部分
example: Stop blaming the model — prompt engineering is half the battle, and yours is sloppy.
exampleTranslation: 别怪模型了——提示词工程就占了一大半，你写的太粗糙了。

naturalMeaning: 在提示词中给AI分配一个特定的角色或身份来引导输出风格
example: Give it a persona — tell it to act like a senior software engineer reviewing code.
exampleTranslation: 给它一个人设——让它扮演一个做代码评审的高级软件工程师。

expression: you have to hold its hand
naturalMeaning: 指令必须写得非常详细、一步步引导，否则模型做不对（把模型当新手对待）
example: You can't just say 'summarize this' — you have to hold its hand and tell it the format you want.
exampleTranslation: 你不能只说'总结一下'——你得手把手教它，告诉它你要什么格式。

expression: that prompt is way too vague
naturalMeaning: 提示词写得不够具体明确，导致模型无法给出好的结果
example: That prompt is way too vague — the model has no idea what tone you're going for.
exampleTranslation: 那个提示词太模糊了——模型根本不知道你想要什么语气。

naturalMeaning: 改变问题的措辞或表达方式，看看能不能得到更好的AI回复
example: It keeps misinterpreting the question — try rephrasing it, sometimes that's all it takes.
exampleTranslation: 它一直理解错问题——换个说法试试，有时候就这么简单。

naturalMeaning: 在对话开始时设定系统级别的指令来约束模型的行为和输出风格
example: If you want it to always respond in JSON, just add a system prompt at the top.
exampleTranslation: 如果你想让它一直用JSON回复，在最上面加一个系统提示词就行。

naturalMeaning: 模型没有遵守提示词中的要求，输出偏离了给定的指令
example: I told it to keep it short but it wrote a whole essay — it's not following instructions.
exampleTranslation: 我让它简短点，结果它写了一整篇文章——它没按要求做。

expression: RAG it from the knowledge base
naturalMeaning: 通过检索增强生成的方式，从知识库中获取相关文档再交给模型回答
example: Don't rely on the model's memory — RAG it from the knowledge base so you get accurate info.
exampleTranslation: 别依赖模型的记忆——从知识库做RAG检索，这样拿到的信息才准确。

naturalMeaning: 让模型的回答基于真实的、可验证的数据，而不是靠其内部知识胡编
example: Before you go live, make sure you ground it in real data so it stops hallucinating facts.
exampleTranslation: 上线之前，一定要用真实数据来锚定模型，别让它再瞎编事实了。

naturalMeaning: 在RAG或对话系统中获取相关的背景信息作为模型的输入
example: The answer was way off because we didn't pull in the context from the latest documents.
exampleTranslation: 答案完全不对，因为我们没有把最新文档的上下文拉进来。

naturalMeaning: 将长文档分割成较小的片段以便于RAG检索和向量化处理
example: You gotta chunk up the documents before you dump them into the vector database.
exampleTranslation: 把文档扔进向量数据库之前，你得先把它们切分成小块。

naturalMeaning: RAG系统检索到的文档中有很多不相关的内容，降低了回答质量
example: The retrieval is noisy — we're pulling in a bunch of irrelevant chunks that confuse the model.
exampleTranslation: 检索结果噪声很大——拉回了一堆不相关的片段，把模型搞糊涂了。

expression: the embedding doesn't capture the nuance
literalTranslation: 向量嵌入没有捕捉到细微差别
naturalMeaning: 嵌入向量无法准确表达语义上的微妙差异，导致检索匹配不精确
example: Search keeps returning the wrong docs because the embedding doesn't capture the nuance of the query.
exampleTranslation: 搜索老是返回错的文档，因为向量嵌入没有捕捉到查询的细微语义差别。

naturalMeaning: 将RAG检索到的多个信息片段组合成一个连贯的最终输出
example: The model has to stitch together the results from three different documents to answer the question.
exampleTranslation: 模型得把来自三份不同文档的结果拼接起来才能回答问题。

naturalMeaning: 构建AI代理能够自主执行多步操作、调用工具并根据结果进行下一步决策的工作流
example: We need to set up an agent loop so it can search the web, check the database, and then decide what to do next.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要搭建一个代理循环，让它能自己搜索网页、查数据库、再决定下一步做什么。

naturalMeaning: AI代理的行为失控，做出意料之外或不当的操作（半开玩笑的说法）
example: The agent went rogue and started spamming the API — we had to kill it manually.
exampleTranslation: 代理失控开始疯狂调用API——我们只能手动给它杀了。

naturalMeaning: 为AI代理提供可以调用的外部工具（如搜索引擎、计算器、数据库API等）
example: The agent can't do anything useful until you give the agent tools like a web search and a calculator.
exampleTranslation: 你不给代理配上网搜索和计算器之类的工具，它就什么有用的事也做不了。

expression: the agent is stuck in a loop
naturalMeaning: AI代理反复执行相同的操作步骤而无法继续推进或完成任务
example: It keeps calling the same function over and over — the agent is stuck in a loop.
exampleTranslation: 它一直在反复调用同一个函数——代理陷入死循环了。

expression: hand it off to the agent
naturalMeaning: 将某个任务移交给AI代理来自动完成，不需要人工干预
example: Instead of manually processing each ticket, just hand it off to the agent and let it handle it.
exampleTranslation: 别手动处理每个工单了，直接交给代理去处理吧。

expression: the agent can't recover from that
literalTranslation: 代理无法从那个错误中恢复
naturalMeaning: AI代理在执行过程中遇到了无法自行处理的错误或异常情况
example: The API returned a 500 error and the agent can't recover from that — it just gives up.
exampleTranslation: API返回了一个500错误，代理处理不了——它直接放弃了。

naturalMeaning: 协调和调度多个AI代理协同工作，每个代理负责不同的子任务
example: We ended up having to orchestrate multiple agents — one for research, one for writing, one for fact-checking.
exampleTranslation: 我们最后不得不编排多个代理——一个负责调研、一个负责写作、一个负责事实核查。

expression: the agent hallucinated a tool call
literalTranslation: 代理凭空编造了一个工具调用
naturalMeaning: AI代理调用了不存在或不应该调用的函数，生成了虚假的工具调用参数
example: It tried to call a function that doesn't even exist — the agent hallucinated a tool call again.
exampleTranslation: 它试图调用一个根本不存在的函数——代理又凭空编造了一个工具调用。

naturalMeaning: 增加训练数据量来提高模型性能，不一定是最优雅但简单直接的做法
example: If the model isn't performing well on that edge case, just throw more data at it.
exampleTranslation: 如果模型在那个边界案例上表现不好，就多给它点数据。

naturalMeaning: 确保训练数据的标签准确一致，这是微调和监督学习的基础
example: Fine-tuning won't save you if you don't label your data properly — bad labels kill everything.
exampleTranslation: 如果不把数据标注好，微调也救不了你——糟糕的标签毁一切。

naturalMeaning: 微调过程没有产生预期的效果，模型的性能没有显著改善
example: We ran the full training cycle but the fine-tune didn't take — accuracy barely moved.
exampleTranslation: 我们跑了完整的训练流程，但微调没起作用——准确率几乎没变。

expression: you're overfitting to the training set
naturalMeaning: 模型在训练数据上表现很好，但在新数据上表现很差，说明学过头了
example: Your accuracy on the test set is terrible — you're overfitting to the training set.
exampleTranslation: 你在测试集上的准确率很差——你过拟合训练集了。

literalTranslation: 我们需要更多样化的数据
naturalMeaning: 训练数据缺乏多样性或覆盖面不够，需要补充不同来源、不同风格的数据
example: The model only works on formal text because we need more diverse data — it's never seen slang.
exampleTranslation: 模型只在正式文本上表现好，因为我们需要更多样化的数据——它从没见过俚语。

naturalMeaning: 在微调时固定预训练模型的底层参数不变，只更新上层参数以节省计算资源
example: You don't have to retrain everything — just freeze the base layers and fine-tune the top.
exampleTranslation: 不用重新训练所有层——冻结基础层，只微调顶层就行。

naturalMeaning: 使用低秩适配（LoRA）这种高效微调方法，在不大幅增加参数的情况下适配模型
example: Don't waste resources on full fine-tuning — just LoRA it up and call it a day.
exampleTranslation: 别浪费资源做全量微调了——用LoRA搞一下就行了。

naturalMeaning: 用标准评测基准来测试模型，并与初始或参考版本进行比较评估
example: Before we ship this new version, let's benchmark it against the baseline to see if it's actually better.
exampleTranslation: 在发布这个新版本之前，我们先拿基准来对比测试一下，看是不是真的有提升。

naturalMeaning: 模型错误地将正常内容判断为异常或标注为特定类别，即判断错了
example: The model flagged this email as spam but it's a real customer inquiry — that's a false positive.
exampleTranslation: 模型把这封邮件标记成了垃圾邮件，但这是真实的客户咨询——这是误报。

expression: we're getting a lot of false negatives
naturalMeaning: 模型漏掉了本应检测到的目标内容，即应该识别但没识别出来
example: The safety filter is too lenient — we're getting a lot of false negatives on toxic content.
exampleTranslation: 安全过滤器太宽松了——很多有害内容都没被检测到，漏报太多。

naturalMeaning: 在AI系统的决策流程中保留人工审核环节，让人类做最终决策
example: For anything financial, we always keep a human in the loop — the model can suggest but not decide.
exampleTranslation: 凡是涉及财务的，我们都保留人在回路中——模型可以建议但不能做决定。

naturalMeaning: 用评估数据集或评估流程来测试模型的性能
example: Before we merge this into production, run it through eval and make sure the numbers look good.
exampleTranslation: 在合并到生产环境之前，拿去跑一下评估，确保数字没问题。

expression: rouge score doesn't tell the full story
literalTranslation: ROUGE分数不能说明全部问题
naturalMeaning: 自动评估指标（如ROUGE）只能衡量表面上的文本重叠，无法评估真实质量
example: The ROUGE score looks great but the summaries are completely unreadable — yeah, ROUGE score doesn't tell the full story.
exampleTranslation: ROUGE分数看着不错，但摘要完全没法读——对，ROUGE分数不能说明全部问题。

expression: eyeball a sample of the outputs
naturalMeaning: 人工抽查一部分模型输出，用肉眼（经验）判断质量好坏
example: Don't trust the metrics alone — eyeball a sample of the outputs and see if they actually make sense.
exampleTranslation: 别光信指标——肉眼扫一下输出样本，看看是不是真的合理。

naturalMeaning: 分阶段部署新模型或新功能，先小范围测试再逐步扩大覆盖
example: We're not going to flip the switch for everyone at once — we'll roll it out gradually to catch issues early.
exampleTranslation: 我们不会一下子对所有人开放——我们会逐步推出，尽早发现问题。

naturalMeaning: 将代码或模型部署到线上生产环境中
example: QA gave the sign-off, so go ahead and push it to prod.
exampleTranslation: QA已经批准了，推到生产环境吧。

naturalMeaning: 先让一小部分用户使用新版，观察没有问题后再全量推送的部署策略
example: Let's do a canary release with 5% of traffic first and see if there are any issues.
exampleTranslation: 先做个金丝雀发布，放出5%的流量看看有没有问题。

naturalMeaning: 部署和启动一个新的API服务接口，使模型可以通过该接口提供服务
example: We're spinning up a new endpoint for the v2 model on a different cluster.
exampleTranslation: 我们正在不同的集群上为v2模型起一个新端点。

expression: the inference is way too slow
naturalMeaning: 模型每一次推理（生成回复）花费的时间太长，用户体验不好
example: We can't put this in production — the inference is way too slow, users won't wait that long.
exampleTranslation: 这个不能上线——推理速度太慢了，用户等不了那么久。

naturalMeaning: 限制系统性能的关键因素是GPU显存不足，无法加载更大的模型或批次
example: We can't increase the batch size because the bottleneck is the GPU memory — we're maxed out.
exampleTranslation: 我们没办法增加批次大小，因为瓶颈是GPU显存——已经用满了。

expression: the cost per token adds up fast
literalTranslation: 每token的成本很快就积累起来了
naturalMeaning: 即使每次推理的成本很小，但大量使用后总成本会迅速增加
example: Yeah the model is great, but the cost per token adds up fast when you're handling a million requests a day.
exampleTranslation: 模型确实很好，但每天处理一百万次请求的时候，每token的成本很快就积累起来了。

naturalMeaning: 输入输出的token数量过多导致成本过高或超出限制，造成了严重的问题
example: Every response is huge because it dumps the entire document every time — token counting is killing us.
exampleTranslation: 每次回复都超级大，因为它每次都把整份文档倒出来——token计数搞得我们很头疼。

naturalMeaning: API调用量很大，正在快速消耗购买的服务额度或预算
example: We need to optimize the prompts — we're burning through credits way faster than expected.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要优化提示词——额度消耗的速度远超预期。

expression: it makes stuff up when it doesn't know
literalTranslation: 它不知道的时候就瞎编
naturalMeaning: 模型在不确定答案时会编造看起来合理但实际上错误的信息（即胡编乱造）
example: That's the problem with these models — it makes stuff up when it doesn't know instead of saying 'I don't know'.
exampleTranslation: 这些模型的问题就在这里——不知道的时候就瞎编，而不是说'我不知道'。

literalTranslation: 模型自信地给出了错误答案
naturalMeaning: 模型用非常肯定的语气给出了完全错误的结果，这比不确定更危险
example: What's scary is the model is confidently wrong — it sounds so sure even when it's completely off.
exampleTranslation: 可怕的是模型自信地给出了错误答案——即使完全错了，听起来也特别肯定。

naturalMeaning: 模型生成了虚构的数据、统计数字或具体事实，看起来真但完全是假的
example: Don't trust any numbers the model gives you — it's hallucinating facts and figures left and right.
exampleTranslation: 别信模型给的任何数字——它到处在胡编事实和数据。

naturalMeaning: 凭直觉或经验判断模型的输出有问题，认为不可信（BS=bullshit）
example: I'd call BS on that output — there's no way that statistic is real.
exampleTranslation: 我觉得那个输出有问题——那个统计数据不可能是真的。

literalTranslation: 引用的来源根本不存在
naturalMeaning: 模型在回复中提供了虚假的引用文献或来源链接，这些资料从来不存在的
example: I looked up the paper it cited and the source doesn't exist — the model just made it up.
exampleTranslation: 我去查了它引用的那篇论文，结果来源根本不存在——模型瞎编的。

naturalMeaning: 模型的回答完全是随机的猜测，没有任何事实依据
example: Its answer on the historical date was a wild guess — off by about 200 years.
exampleTranslation: 它对那个历史日期的回答完全是瞎猜——差了200年左右。

expression: it needs to stay within the context window
literalTranslation: 它需要保持在上下文窗口范围内
naturalMeaning: 输入内容不能超过模型的最大上下文长度限制，否则会被截断或报错
example: We can't dump the whole codebase in at once — it needs to stay within the context window.
exampleTranslation: 我们不能把整个代码库一次性扔进去——它需要保持在上下文窗口范围内。

expression: the context window is filling up
naturalMeaning: 对话或输入内容已经消耗了大量上下文空间，很快就要达到最大限制
example: We've been chatting for a while and the context window is filling up — it's going to start forgetting soon.
exampleTranslation: 我们已经聊了一会儿了，上下文窗口快满了——它很快就要开始忘记前面的内容了。

naturalMeaning: 模型在长对话中忘记或混淆了之前的上下文，输出与前面的讨论脱节
example: Halfway through the conversation it started talking about something else entirely — it lost the thread.
exampleTranslation: 聊到一半它开始说完全无关的事情——它跟丢话题了。

naturalMeaning: 删除较早的对话轮次来减少上下文占用，保留最近和最重要的内容
example: We need to trim the conversation history before the next call or we'll blow past the limit.
exampleTranslation: 我们得在下次调用之前修剪一下对话历史，否则会超出限制。

expression: it can only remember so much
naturalMeaning: 模型的上下文窗口有限，无法记住无限长的历史信息
example: Don't expect it to remember what you said 10,000 tokens ago — it can only remember so much.
exampleTranslation: 别指望它记住一万个token之前你说过的话——它只能记住这么多。

naturalMeaning: 在某个AI基准测试排行榜上获得最高分数或排名
example: Their new model topped the leaderboard on every major benchmark last week.
exampleTranslation: 他们的新模型上周在所有主要基准测试中登顶排行榜。

expression: humans still beat it on this benchmark
literalTranslation: 人类在这个基准上仍然打败了它
naturalMeaning: 尽管模型表现优异，但在某个特定测试中人类的成绩仍然更好
example: Sure, it's impressive, but humans still beat it on this benchmark by about 10 percent.
exampleTranslation: 确实很厉害，但在这个基准测试上人类仍然比它高大约10个百分点。

naturalMeaning: 当前的主流基准测试已经太容易，所有模型分数都很高，无法区分能力差异
example: Everyone scores 95% plus on MMLU now — the benchmarks are saturated, we need harder tests.
exampleTranslation: 现在所有模型在MMLU上都能拿到95%以上——基准测试已经饱和了，我们需要更难的测试。

naturalMeaning: 只展示模型表现好的评测指标来让结果更好看（有误导性）
example: Don't cherry-pick the metrics — show me all the results, including the ones where it underperformed.
exampleTranslation: 别只挑有利的指标——把所有结果都给我看，包括表现差的那几个。

naturalMeaning: 某个AI项目的成功主要依靠大规模的计算资源投入，而不是算法创新
example: Their whole strategy is scaling up — it's a compute play more than a research breakthrough.
exampleTranslation: 他们的整个策略就是规模化——更多是拼算力而不是研究突破。

naturalMeaning: 不依赖正式指标，凭直观感受判断模型的输出是否自然、合理
example: The metrics look good but let me vibe check the output first — sometimes stats lie.
exampleTranslation: 指标看着不错，但让我先凭感觉检查一下输出——有时候数据会骗人。

expression: quantize the model to shrink it
naturalMeaning: 通过降低模型权重的精度（如从FP16到INT8）来减小模型大小和加速推理
example: The model is too big for mobile — quantize the model to shrink it down to a reasonable size.
exampleTranslation: 这个模型对手机来说太大了——量化一下来压缩体积吧。

expression: the latency is killing the user experience
literalTranslation: 延迟正在毁掉用户体验
naturalMeaning: 模型响应速度太慢，严重影响了用户的使用体验
example: We can't ship this — the latency is killing the user experience, nobody waits five seconds for a reply.
exampleTranslation: 这个不能上线——延迟正在毁掉用户体验，没人愿意等五秒才收到回复。

expression: we need to cache the responses
literalTranslation: 我们需要缓存响应结果
naturalMeaning: 对相同的输入缓存模型的输出，避免重复计算来降低成本和提高速度
example: For frequently asked questions, we need to cache the responses instead of hitting the model every time.
exampleTranslation: 对于常见问题，我们需要缓存响应结果，而不是每次都去调模型。

naturalMeaning: API调用频率达到上限，新的请求被阻止或延迟处理
example: We hit 10,000 requests in a minute and now rate limiting is kicking in — we have to slow down.
exampleTranslation: 我们一分钟内打了一万次请求，现在限流开始生效了——得降速了。
